ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Nuris, via Zoom, for and with Michael Bagatelos, Administrator.

Mr. Nuris reports that Neil Ormond has had some health-related issues recently which have delayed his tasks. The court and Mr. Nuris discuss a possible probate proceeding in Montana as assets may have been found in that state as well as in Wyoming. Mr. Bagatelos reports of ongoing search for assets and that Mr. Ormond has been advised of his plan to close this estate, soon. The court advises that it is inclined to allow additional time as prayed in the instant petition but that it will not be inclined to do so moving forward unless progress has been made and good cause is provided. The parties advise that they hope to have this estate closed soon.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Thomas Nuris to appear on December 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Continued To Nov-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Nuris for Petitioner.

Mr. Nuris requested a 30-day continuance stating that he will file a petition for approval of a status report, that there are limited assets, that they found a professional to deal with the oil leases and royalty rights, and that they have located close to $50,000.00 in assets. Status on close of estate is continued to November 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Continued To May-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for Personal Representative

Mr. Nuris stated that his client made some inquiries as to the oil leases with an investigator to track down the oil claims, that his e-filed status report was rejected due to his error, and he will need to re-file with a new hearing date. The Court reminded Counsel to get his filings in early to allow time for review, possible corrections when documents get rejected for various reasons, and to be mindful of local rules. The Status on close of Estate is continued to May 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Continued To Apr-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Nuris for Michael Bagatelos (Personal Representative)

Mr. Nuris stated that this case fell through the cracks, the estate does not appear to have any real assets in it and the Personal Representative was appointed because the decedent left lots of documents regarding oil leases. The Personal Representative has been attempting to identify any assets, apparently there aren't any and he will be reaching out to the Personal Representative to obtain more information. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to April 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel, that he needs to have filed either a petition for final distribution, a petition for termination, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by March 28, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
